title: Subawards at Morgan State University — D-RED Seminar Slides
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-10-12 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Subawards at Morgan State University'. Presented by Matthew Lee, MBA. Explains the subaward process at MSU: when to issue a subaward vs. a contractor agreement, risk assessment, monitoring requirements, and the routing workflow. A 2021-09-08 YouTube recording of 'Sub-Award Process' by Matthew Lee is also available: https://youtu.be/qD6Efajaq5M
